mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chef_audit_record (chef_user_id, audit_status, operator_id, reject_reason, create_time, audit_time) VALUES (#{record.chefUserId}, #{record.auditStatus}, #{record.operatorId}, #{record.rejectReason}, #{record.createTime}, #{record.auditTime})

update.foreach: UPDATE chef_audit_record SET chef_user_id = #{record.chefUserId}, audit_status = #{record.auditStatus}, operator_id = #{record.operatorId}, reject_reason = #{record.rejectReason}, create_time = #{record.createTime}, audit_time = #{record.auditTime} WHERE id = #{record.id}

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chef_audit_record WHERE audit_status = 1 and id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM chef_audit_record GROUP BY chef_user_id ) ORDER BY create_time DESC
